full_text:
Shang Sheng 商升
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shang Sheng (商升). Opposed Sun Ce and defeated Han Yan. Wanted to surrender to He Qi but was murdered by his vassals. Shang Sheng was affiliated with Wang Lang. Shang Sheng lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
